title: Google Cloud Dataflow Job Metrics
description: Contains metrics and their values for a Dataflow job, including counters, distributions, and other execution metrics that provide insight into pipeline performance.

metricTime.description: Timestamp as of which metric values are current.

MetricUpdate.description: Describes the state of a metric at a particular point in time.

name.description: The structured name of the metric.

kind.description: Metric aggregation kind. Possible values include Sum, Max, Min, Mean, Set, And, Or, Distribution, LatestValue.

cumulative.description: True if this metric is reported as the total cumulative aggregate value.

scalar.description: Worker-computed aggregate value for aggregation kinds Sum, Max, Min.

meanSum.description: Worker-computed aggregate sum value for the Mean aggregation kind.

meanCount.description: Worker-computed aggregate count value for the Mean aggregation kind.

set.description: Worker-computed aggregate value for the Set aggregation kind.

distribution.description: A struct value describing properties of a distribution of numeric values.

gauge.description: A struct value describing properties of a gauge metric.

internal.description: Worker-computed aggregate value for internal use by the service.

updateTime.description: Timestamp associated with the metric value.

MetricStructuredName.description: Identifies a metric, using both the key and the context in which it appears.

origin.description: Origin (namespace) of metric name. Typical values are dataflow/v1b3 and user.

context.description: Zero or more labeled fields identifying the part of the job this metric is associated with.
